DELETE_ACCOUNT_CONFIRM_SUBHEADING: Deleting your account is final and will result in the irreversible loss of activation entitlements, levels and stats for all Rockstar Games PC titles, purchased DLC, as well as access to your Friends list and Crew memberships.

RESTORE_FAILED: We were not able to find and restore a previous purchase of this game. If you believe this is a mistake, please contact Rockstar Support.
